content:
🚀 Now ready to execute Version 8.9. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 9.0 – Sacrificial Reversals, One-Time Fate Counters, & Physical Rituals


🚀 This iteration finalizes the mechanics of fate manipulation, sacrifice-based reversals, permanent archetype purges, and the necessity of physical rituals.

📜 1. Fate Manipulations & Reversals Require Sacrifices

📜 Fate can still be altered, but undoing it now requires two players to sacrifice something meaningful.

✔ How Fate Manipulations Work:
• A player can trigger a fate shift (ex: nudging the wheel, altering destiny, making a bargain).
• To reverse a fate shift, two other players must sacrifice something.
• The sacrifices must be tangible and must outweigh the benefit gained.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 531 (chunk 531/555)
